body:
# this resourcepack is no longer maintained :(
use assorted allays (https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/assorted-allays) instead


## A resource pack that change Allay's color by renaming it with a name tag.

 ![Azalea, Sculk, Rory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f41551d21e22e29e2a74cea289aacd550ecbc939.png)

 

# List of all renames:


Red - Rose

Orange - Amber

Yellow - Sunny

Lime - Apple

Green - Jade

Cyan - Cyan (wow)

Blue - Azure
Magenta - Scarlett

Purple - Lavender

Pink - Rory

White - Ivory

Light Gray - Ashley

Gray - Asher

Black - Ebony


There are a few ones that are not related with color:

 

Grass, Azalea, Magma, Vex, Sculk, Moss, Amethyst



## Requires Optifine or ETF!!!

### Recommended to use with RP RENAMES
